content.text:
It's... uncomfortable. Like I want to immediately make a plan or write something down or -- 

*quiet*

It's kind of heavy, actually. I didn't realize how heavy it was. I've just been going so fast that I didn't -- 

I keep thinking if I just get through this month, if I just nail Thursday, if I just get on top of the list, then I'll feel like I can do this job. But that's... that's been the plan for three months and the list just keeps getting longer.
